name: School of Sex
description:
18+ only

This is the School of Sex! A school where every student and teacher is free to have sex everyday, everywhere and with everyone. Consent is given for granted although people can refuse sexhual interactions.

There are traditional and brand-new subjects to learn!

You can be whatever you want as long as you're an adult: a student, a teacher, a janitor o the principal!

Come and join us at the best high school ever, where you'll make new friendships, fuck them and fuck them again!

The are 3 starting scenarios:

1) You're a new virgin student

2) You're already a student

3) You're a teacher

Every character is a legally consenti adult of at least 18 years old.
